mapper.select: /** UsptTaskPrtcmpnyDao.selectList */ select task_partcptn_entrprs_id ,bsns_plan_doc_id ,entrps_nm ,rspnber_nm ,clsf_nm ,enc_telno ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_email ,tlsy_regist_no ,member_id , (select member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utp.member_id) as member_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from uspt_task_prtcmpny utp where 1=1 and bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId}
